executable.title: Build Pixel Classifier
executable.description: Train a pixel-level classifier on brush annotations from a whole-slide image. Reads a pixelmap annotation for labeled patch centers, extracts embeddings (TRIDENT h5 primary path, ResNet-18 GPU fallback), trains a scikit-learn classifier head, generates a full-slide prediction overlay, and posts results back to Girder.

string.name: item_id
string.label: Slide Item ID
string.description: Girder item ID of the whole-slide image to train on.

string.name: annotation_id
string.label: Training Annotation ID
string.description: Girder annotation ID of the pixelmap annotation containing labeled brush strokes.

string.name: classes_json
string.label: Class Definitions (JSON)
string.description: JSON array of class definition objects, e.g. [{"name":"Tumor","fillColor":"rgba(255,0,0,0.4)"},{"name":"Stroma","fillColor":"rgba(0,200,0,0.4)"}]. Order must match pixelmap category indices.

string.name: session_name
string.label: Session Name
string.description: Name of the pixel classifier session (used for annotation and model item naming).

integer.name: iteration
integer.label: Iteration Number
integer.description: 1-based training iteration counter. Used in overlay annotation naming.

string-enumeration.name: model_type
string-enumeration.label: Model Type
string-enumeration.description: Classifier architecture. trident_linear: logistic regression on pre-computed TRIDENT patch embeddings (fastest). trident_mlp: MLP on TRIDENT embeddings. resnet_linear: logistic regression on GPU ResNet-18 features (fallback when no TRIDENT embeddings). random_forest: Random Forest on handcrafted color/texture features (CPU-only fallback).

integer.name: magnification
integer.label: Magnification
integer.description: Target magnification level for patch extraction and inference.

integer.name: patch_size
integer.label: Patch Size (pixels)
integer.description: Square patch size in pixels for feature extraction. 512 recommended for TRIDENT models; 256 for ResNet; 64-128 for random_forest.

integer.name: n_estimators
integer.label: Number of Trees
integer.description: Number of trees for random_forest model type. Ignored for other model types.

string.name: job_dir
string.label: Output Directory
string.description: Container-internal path where model.pkl and training_report.json will be written.

string.name: output_folder_id
string.label: Results Folder
string.description: Girder folder ID where the model item will be created. Leave empty to use the invoking user's Private folder.

parameters.label: Girder API URL and Key
parameters.description: Auto-injected by Slicer CLI Web; do not set manually.
